name: Jerry's Jewelry & Loans
description_short: Jerry's Jewelry & Loans is a credit repair provider based in Lynnwood, Washington. Rated 4.2/5 with 57 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Jerry's Jewelry & Loans is a credit repair provider serving clients in Lynnwood, Washington. Carrying a 4.2/5.0 Google rating from 57 reviews, Jerry's Jewelry & Loans has an strong reputation among consumers in the Lynnwood area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a gold dealer, jewelry buyer, jewelry repair service, Jerry's Jewelry & Loans provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Lynnwood, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Jerry's Jewelry & Loans operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Lynnwood, Washington area who are considering Jerry's Jewelry & Loans should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
